definition:
δι-έρχομαι 
 [in LXX for אֵבֶר, הָלַךְ, בּוֹא, etc. ;] 
  1. to go through, pass through; 
   (a) of things: Mat.19:24, Mrk.10:25, Luk.2:35, al.; 
   (b) of persons: Luk.19:4; with accusative loc., Luk.19:1, Heb.4:14, Act.12:10; before διά, with genitive loc., Mat.12:43, 1Co.10:1; before εἰς, Mrk.4:35; ἕως, Luk.2:15. 
   2. to go about: Luk.9:6, Act.20:25; of a report, to spread, go abroad (Thuc.), Luk.5:15 
 (AS)
